rationale: The citation is used in a core theoretical role, not as a passing mention. The citing paper explicitly treats Shiv, Carmon, and Ariely (2005b) as the original model of marketing placebo effects and maps that model into its own framework (including Figure 1). The authors then state they extend that model with neuroscience-based mediators and individual-difference moderators and test those additions across multiple studies.
relation_description: The citing paper directly builds on Shiv et al. (2005b)'s marketing placebo-effects model as its conceptual base and extends it by adding and testing new neural and personality moderators of placebo effects in consumption.
